hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today brings a burst of energy that motivates you to tackle challenges head-on. Embrace the change and be proactive.
aries.love: Romantic possibilities are high today. Open your heart and let love lead the way.
aries.career: New opportunities may arise in your professional life. Be alert and ready to seize them.

taurus.general: You may feel a bit stubborn today, but a little flexibility can lead to unexpected joys.
taurus.love: Communication is essential. Express your feelings honestly to build deeper connections.
taurus.career: Stability is key. Focus on the tasks at hand and ensure your work is up to your high standards.

gemini.general: A day filled with social interactions awaits. Enjoy connecting with friends and new acquaintances.
gemini.love: A conversation could spark a new romance. Keep your eyes and heart open.
gemini.career: Use your communication skills to captivate colleagues. Share your ideas confidently.

cancer.general: Emotional waves may hit you today—but use that energy to create something beautiful.
cancer.love: Your sensitivity can deepen your relationships today. Share your thoughts openly.
cancer.career: Take initiatives that reflect your passion. Your intuition will guide you.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today, making it easy to attract positive attention. Embrace the spotlight.
leo.love: A playful date night could bring you closer to your partner.
leo.career: Teamwork will yield the best results. Collaborate with passion and creativity.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today. Pay attention to what could easily be overlooked.
virgo.love: Demonstrate your love through small acts of kindness. It will be appreciated more than words.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills are sharp today. Tackle complex projects with confidence.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
professional.author: John D. Rockefeller

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen; you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
professional.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
motivation.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Life is a collection of moments. Make them count!
Stay humble, work hard, be kind.

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great thing about technology is that it allows us to do more with less.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
faith.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

faith.text: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says 'I'm possible'!
faith.author: Audrey Hepburn

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Where there is faith there is love, where there is love there is peace, where there is peace there is God.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the end, we will remember not the words of our enemies, but the silence of our friends.
wisdom.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

wisdom.text: To know how to hide one's ability is great skill.
wisdom.author: Francois de La Rochefoucauld

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: We do not see things as they are, we see them as we are.
wisdom.author: The Talmud
